# Workshop Agenda

Save under `docs/elicitation/guides/workshop-<topic>.md`.

- Date / time:

- Facilitator:

- Objective 1.

## Expected Output

- Output 1 (e.g. agreed business process v0).
- Output 2 (e.g. list of MoSCoW priorities).

## Agenda

| Time | Activity | Format | Owner | Output |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 00:00-00:10 | Welcome and objectives | discussion | facilitator | |
| 00:10-00:40 | Current state walkthrough | discussion + whiteboard | | |
| 00:40-01:10 | Pain points and constraints | sticky-note brainstorm | all | |
| 01:10-01:40 | Desired future state | scenario walkthrough | | |
| 01:40-02:00 | Prioritization | MoSCoW or dot vote | all | priority list |
| 02:00-02:10 | Wrap-up and next steps | discussion | facilitator | actions |

## Materials Needed

- Item.

## Pre-Read

- Item.

## Ground Rules

- One conversation at a time.
- Park solution debates; capture them on the parking lot for later.
- Decisions made today are draft until confirmed in writing.

## Post-Workshop Checklist

- [ ] Session log created.
- [ ] Raw statements extracted per participant where possible.
- [ ] Parking-lot items recorded as open questions.
- [ ] Glossary candidates flagged.
- [ ] Output circulated to participants for confirmation.

## History

- YYYY-MM-DD: created.
